props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale for month/weekday names.

props.name: events
props.description: Appointment dots (`{ date, label?, tone? }`), keyed by `date`.

props.name: prices
props.description: Per-day price label, keyed by ISO date.

props.name: maxDots
props.description: Max appointment dots before a "+N" overflow marker.

props.name: yearColumns
props.description: Mini-months per row in the year view.

props.name: views
props.description: Views offered in the built-in switcher (one entry = no switcher).

props.name: viewLabels
props.description: Override the switcher labels per view.

props.name: showToday
props.description: Show the "today" shortcut in the header.

props.name: prevLabel
props.description: Header control labels (fall back to the i18n catalog).

props.name: nextLabel
props.description: Header control labels (fall back to the i18n catalog).

props.name: todayLabel
props.description: Header control labels (fall back to the i18n catalog).

props.name: viewsLabel
props.description: Accessible name for the view switcher.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the grid (falls back to the i18n catalog).

props.name: mode
props.description: Single date, or a start–end range.

props.name: rangeStart
props.description: Range endpoints (when `mode="range"`).

props.name: rangeEnd
props.description: Range endpoints (when `mode="range"`).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the selected date changes.

props.name: onFocusChange
props.description: Called when the focused date changes.

props.name: onViewChange
props.description: Called when the active view changes.

props.name: onRangeChange
props.type: ((start: string | null, end: string | null) => void) | undefined
props.description: Called when the range changes.
